overview: A fully functional multi-page marketing website for an IT and web services agency. Features 12+ pages covering web design, IT support, managed services, POS solutions, pricing packages, industry verticals, portfolio, blog, and contact/consultation booking — all with clean professional design, subtle animations, and editable content.
features: 12+ page website with navigation and routing
Service pages for Web Design, IT Support, Managed IT, POS, Backup & Recovery
Industry-specific pages for Tradies, Retail, Medical, Hospitality
Light/dark mode with editable color tokens
